/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/bench_flops.dir/flops.cpp.o  -o /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/ecl_core_apps/bench_flops  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib: /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_geometry.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_linear_algebra.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_ipc.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_streams.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_devices.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_formatters.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_threads.so -lpthread /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_time.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_exceptions.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_type_traits.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_time_lite.so -lrt -pthread /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_errors.so -lrt
